It was...wrong. That's a better word for it. 

It took a decade and a half to create and release, all the while being the butt of many a 'Will be released when hell freezes over' joke. 

And then it was released, and...it should have silenced those jokes forever. That's how the story's supposed to go: the mocked protagonist reveals itself to be everything its detractors claimed it could never be. 

Instead, it was just...mediocre. At best. Something a third-party studio could've done in a year.
